executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Frontend landing only: http://localhost:3000/ single route /. ONLY GitHub links require click or strict external handoff; validate href, target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer on landing DOM (data-testid link-github-*). All other sections: visibility + scroll or hashes #features #how-it-works #setup #model-config—do NOT require clicking setup mode toggles or model provider tabs. Do not call forge-api. Pass if external sites fail to load but landing markup is correct.
